Full combo when he's not CC immune.
Just keep pushing away. Whenever he reach with passive or 2nd skill.

Auto win. Just press anything.
Their entire comp don't matter at this point.
Keep Full CC before he attach on your dps.

Auto win.

Most Benet player doesn't have spell vamp-> lower their health will mostly make them lose their chance.

Honestly just 2nd skill.
Badang can stop guni 2nd skill with all of his skill+ passive very efficiently.
He has shield,push,stun mostly perfect counter.
You should keep poking and pushing him back, since enemy will have healers.

hero.hero_overview:
Badang roam is playstyle of a normal roamer, completely different from badang exp. MY GUIDE IS VERY UNIQUE AND EXCLUSIVE.(#Onetrick)
[[There are hero tips at hero strength and weakness.]]

Roamers guide(exclusive badang) from starting up(personal choice, encourage blessing)
When game start [UNLOCK : Skill2] then go to enemy jg buff(blue/red) and get vision and exp golds->help midlane clear and get [Level :2] fast.

Repeat the process of exploiting the roamer blessings by clearing mid, revealing and tagging enemy jg and try to Steal or Delay his [GREEN Camps]. 

Do this until you see enemy laners over extending and easily punish them.->go back mid(clear)->join [Turtle].

Note: If you weren't to able to follow these steps completely then it's fine, just keep help mid clearing the lane and farm more [Golds], [EXP] dosent matter once you are [Level:4]. 

[Turtle]: IF YOU DID successfully follow these(getting a few kill/assist) and join the first turtle, you will be level 4 and then either your enemy JG/MID/ROAMER will still be level 3.

After you fail/successfully [TURTLE] Fight then focus on the enemy gold laner or Protect your gold laner(if they were mm), occucianally go to mid to clear.

{If they are not mm, focus on enemy jg.}

COMPLETELY IGNORE THE ENEMY EXP. YOU ARE STRONGER THAN MOST ENEMY EXP,MID AND ROAMER COMBINED AT THIS POINT ONCE YOU UNLEASH FULL COMBO AS SOON AS THEY ARE NEAR/ENGAGED to mid/gold lane.

If the enemy exp is getting 3+ kills then it's good to get shutdown gold with CC chain.

(Dying is optional)

#Thunder belt with 80 stacks at [LATE GAME] is useless. So i usually build the demon hunter.
#You can sell some slot and get mlf roar if you need to defend last stand at base.

#Once you get Demon hunter, congratulations you are a monster. Even late game argus won't be able to win 1v1.
#MM are different story because you can't reach without FK.
hero.hero_strength:
0. Always use the best angle for walls to trigger your passive from BA,SKILL1, ULTIMATE.

1.USE [1st SKILL] with thunder belt when chasing enemy for slow effect. Not trying to 2nd skill first when they're far away.

2. When you are between the enemy back lane and yours and there is enemy roamer with you who's also trying to engage=> USES ULTIMATE TO PUSH THE ENEMY ROAMER/Frontliner INTO YOUR BACK LANE. Your ulti can push far like a flame shot.
Use it to immediately follow up with 2nd skill and ¹st and passive combo.

3.if you are ambushed (and you knew it)=> don't panic.
If they have CC placed on you,USE YOUR ulti First. Distance yourself. Or first skill to push the enemy away from your escape route and ONLY AND THEN USE YOUR 2ND SKILL.
Or else you are Feeding.
Or you can check the map,hope your team will follow up and  engage with 2nd skill and full combo into enemy instead and hope it'll be worth it.

4.if you follow my build and you get Demon hunter, congratulations you are a monster. Even late game argus won't be able to win 1v1.MM are different story because you can't reach without FK.

5.You can sell some slot and get mlf roar if you need to defend last stand at base.

6.if you have the same emblem as me(with pull yourself together) you can spam your flicker to either run or engage more frequently.

7. PLEASE, PLEASE DO NOT EVER GIVE ENEMY SHUTDOWN KILLS,Try to protect yourself or your teammates who are stacking kills to protect your economy(win).
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Badang skill 2 is very important for escaping. (But you can spam it for engaging instead even if you need to run because it is very strong.)

2.badang really needs the flicker(FK). If you don't have it, your badang is missing a feat.
(Pull yourself together emblem)

3.You can't play the same way in exp if you play roam only.
(You need to basically One shot the enemy because you can't disengage)

4. Badang needs High MSPD,if you don't have that, you are lacking a lot of potential.

5. Most badang roamers focus on his 2nd skill shield and skill cool down builds[I disagree with this idea ] will make him weak against burst heroes or CC and also sustains as well punishment if wrong engage, not suitable for newbies especially who knows not much about badang potential .

6.I RECOMMEND 2ND SKILL INSTEAD OF 1ST SKILL. You can find a lot of opportunities in the first minutes of the game.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Badang's early game roaming priorities:

1. _Secure EXP Lane_: Focus on farming and harassing enemy EXP laner.
2. _Gambal_ (Mid Lane): Roam and assist in securing kills or objectives.
3. _Gold Lane_: Help Gold Laner with kills and tower takes.
4. _Ambush_: Set up ambushes in bushes to catch enemy heroes off guard.
5. _Objective takes_: Prioritize taking towers and turrets.

# Key Skills
1. _Fist Swing_: Harass and last-hit minions.
2. _Fist Blast_: Control and stun enemies.
3. _Shield of Fist_: Absorb damage and protect allies.

# Tips
1. Use Fist Swing to farm and harass.
2. Activate Shield of Fist to initiate fights.
3. Prioritize high-priority targets (e.g., enemy mage or marksman).
4. Communicate with team for coordinated gams.
5. Use bushes for ambushes and escapes.

Roam aggressively, secure kills, and take objectives!

dominants.dominant_desc:
Wall plus Fist Combo
The core of Badang power is his second skill (Fist Break) and first skill (Qigong Fist).
Use Fist Break to slam enemies into the wall, then follow up with Qigong Fist for a stun and high damage.
Tip: Aim the wall slightly behind the enemy to trap them and guarantee a full combo.
Ultimate Reset Combo
Start with Fist Break, then Basic Attack, then Qigong Fist, then use Ultimate (Fist Crack).
His Ultimate deals very high burst damage when enemies are stunned or knocked against the wall.
Use Flicker during the Ultimate to reposition and keep enemies in the full damage area.
Bush Play Equals One Shot Kills
Hide in a bush and start the combo when the enemy is close.
This surprise attack can eliminate squishy enemies instantly, especially in the mid or late game.
Jungle Badang Equals Fast Snowball
Choose Retribution and use the Assassin Emblem.
Farm quickly and gank lanes early using your wall combo.
Build Hunter Strike and Blade of the Heptaseas for burst damage and mobility.
Split Push Pressure
Badang passive helps him clear minions very fast.
Push side lanes and force the enemy team to rotate.
When an enemy is alone, ambush and eliminate with a combo.

hero.hero_overview: Badang is a great 1v1 hero in early game and in late game, with  the right build he's a suitable hero for pushing lanes and hunting down enemy's core and damage dealers, he also has great mobility that helps him to move around the map easily to help the team with turtle, lord, and team fights
hero.hero_strength:
1- With the (Burst/Damage) build his skills and combo could produce insane amount of damage which helps with camping the enemies in bushes and wiping minion waves and taking down towers really fast 
2- With the (Tank/Supp) build you get to be a Fighter and a 2nd Roam which is pretty awsome
hero.hero_weakness:
1- Could easily survive a 1v1 situation but never 2v1
2- His 2nd skill is a double edged weapon, sometimes it saves you and sometimes it gets you trapped instead
3- The shield he gets through the ultimate is weak, so choose your targets carefully

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is essential for Badang since he needs to get close to his target in order to execute his lethal combo

counters.counter_desc: As lukas ult make it impossible to use badang skill as during lukas ult he can dodge all the cc....there are many other hero who can counter badang for eg...ruby..eidith etc...but you can easily overplay them if you master badang..

dominants.dominant_desc:
As you r going with thunder belt always try to connect your first skill to enemy as it will increase thunder stack...n try to push the enemy in the wall with first skill as it will stun the enemy more...ofc don't forget to use your second skill to block n stun the enemy...
You can use combo like: second skill with flicker then ult then first skill use it when enemies r far away...

hero.hero_overview: Badang is an exp laner hero he is a man with immense strength and speed he once save his people from a big octupos and injured him badly but still managed to defeat the monster and he didn't kill it he let it go and the monster was impressed by how kind he was so she gave him a iron fists
hero.hero_strength: Badang is a burst type attack speed hero and can be used has a tank for it's CC because he can knockback or stunned that his passive and his skills are CC type good for clashes and his immense burst capabilities can melt a sustain hero
hero.hero_weakness: Badang is weak against hero with mobility like wanwan or phoveus and heroes that can easily escape his stun combo and he is very countered with Dominance ice and Tough boots that make his stun kinda useless

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Miya is a good partner for a tank and sustain exp lane badang because of badang's control abilities, miya can easily free hit enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Tigreal is also a good combo partner for badang. Once tigreal uses his ult skill on enemies badang can also use his crowd control abilities to extend the control duration
Lukas has a slight advantage because of his control immune skills that are hard to counter
The same goes for martis because of his second skill

emblems.emblem_desc: Using this emblem set-up, badang will have a reduced skill cooldown, reduced battle spell cooldown and can regen hp just by using his first on enemies, jungle monsters, and minions

equips.equip_desc: This Build has balanced physical and magical defense and can tank through teamfights

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is a good spell for badang. You can use it to surprise enemies with a freestyle set

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
يتمكن بادانج من الركوب مع جونسون عند استخدام مهارته القصوى و يصطدم جونسون بمسبب الضرر او اكثر بطل مزعج في فريق الخصم و يقوم بادانج بمهاراته على الترتيب  

المهارة الثانية - المهارة الاولى - المهارة القصوى

counters.counter_desc: يتميز بادانج بمهاراته الجماعية التي تسبب الضرر لأكثر من هدف مما يجعل سون هدفا سهلا لأن سون يعتمد على نسخه و يمكن ل بادانج قتله و نسخه في وقت واحد باستخدام مهاراته

dominants.dominant_desc: في بداية المباراة يمكن شراء قطعة واحدة من الحذاء ثم شراء حزام الرعد لتجميع تراكمات في ابكر وقت ممكن ثم إكمال الحذاء و تستخدم المهارة الاولى لقتل الاتباع عن بعد لأن دفاعات البطل في البداية تكون ضعيفة
dominants.dominant_title: بعد المستوى الرابع عند فتح المهارة القصوى يمتلك البطل جميع تأثيرات السيطرة و يتمكن من التسبب بالكثير من الضرر و يستطيع التحرك لمساعدة حلفائه عند قتال السلحفاة او اللورد او قتالات الفريق

emblems.emblem_desc: اختيار مميزات الداعم لتقليل وقت الانتظار مع اكتمال المعدات يجعل المهرة الثانية بدون وقت انتظار و الميزة الاولى تساعده على القيام بالمزيد من الضرر و الميزة الثانية تزيد من دفاعاته مما يجعله مدرعا بشكل قوي و الميزة الثالثة تقوم بالمزيد من الضرر الاضافي مما يجعله متزنا من حيث الضرر و الدفاع

equips.equip_desc: معدات دفاعية كاملة للحصول على دفاعات قوية و حزام الرعد في بداية المعدات لتجميع تراكمات بأكبر قدر ممكن لزيادة الدفاعات و التسبب بالمزيد من الضرر الى جانب الدفاع الجسدي و السحري المكتسب من التراكمات

hero.hero_overview: لدى البطل الكثير من تأثيرات السيطرة و يتحمل الكثير من الضرر في حالة اللعب بمعدات دفاعية و تقلل من وقت انتظار مهاراته بشكل كبير مما يجعله مساعدا للفريق بشكل كبير
hero.hero_strength: لديه الكثير من تاثيرات السيطرة و وقت انتظار مهاراته متوسط و يمكنه القتال في بداية و وسط و نهاية المباراة و يكون مفيدا مع ابطال لديه مهارات جماعية و اغلبهم سحرة مثل فيكسانا و اورورا
hero.hero_weakness: ليس لديه الكثير من نقاط الضعف مما يجعله من اقوى الابطل في طريق الخبرة و في التجول ولكن تجميعه لتراكمات المهارة الخاصة بطيئ في حالة اللعب بمعدات دفاعية و يمكن تعويضها بباقي تأثيرات السيطرة لدى البطل

data.recommend: للاعبين متوسطي المستوى و اللعب الفردي في التصنيف

spell.spell_desc: تمنح البطل مساحة اضافية للحركة و يمكن استخدامها مع المهارة الثانية لبدأ قتال فريق لكي يبدأ بتلقي الضرر و القيام بتاثيرات السيطرة

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Since badang can burst enemy with his ultimate Julian is a perfect match for badang because Julian can also easily reach the backline and burst enemy down during badangs ultimate

counters.counter_desc: Khufra is a nightmare to badang due to his first skill that cancels badangs ultimate not to mention with his wall diving attacks that can stun badang before he unleash his ultimate

dominants.dominant_desc: The trick is to always go harass the enemy and provide vision during turtle or lord fights so that you can follow up with his second and ultimate which helps your teammate to burst them down easily.The easy combo is (second,first,then ultimate and follow up with a passive to stun them quickly)

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem supports him in ganking or harassing the enemy not to mention his weaknesses is his mobility so we used the support emblem and agility which boosts his mobility and wilderness blessings for its juicy fast rotation and for brave smite for sustain and support emblem also provides cd reduction

equips.equip_desc: This emblem lets him to sustain and survive during team fights and it can also counter enemies lineup not to mention the encourage blessings which helps his teammates boosts their attacks

hero.hero_overview: Badang is considered to be a strong hero in this meta due to his first skill which if you pair with thunderbelt you can stack it because he's first skill counts as a basic attack which helps him to survive in his laning phase or roaming
hero.hero_strength: Badang is versatile in the current meta because he's been racking up in the ranking system due to his strength and thunderbelt item which stack if you use your basic attack on the enemy but Badang is very different from the other because he's first skill let him stack thunderbelt faster that's why he's strength is very different to others
hero.hero_weakness: Overall badang is very weak due to his mobility in sort he's second skill lets him dash in a bit distance and due to this back liners hero can burst him down with their ultimate

spell.spell_desc: I recommend using flicker to Badang because this significantly boost his mobility and ganks the enemy with ease
